// File: ./components/ui/textarea.tsx
import * as React from 'react';

import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';
import { Glowing } from '#components/custom-ui/styling/glowing.ts';
import { APPS } from '#types/ENUMS.ts';

function TextArea({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<'textarea'>) {
  return (
    <textarea
      data-slot="input"
      className={cn(
        // Use transparent border so the textarea doesn't show a dark default border,
        // while preserving layout and focus ring behavior for accessibility.
        //  OLD STYLE
        // 'file:text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground selection:bg-primary selection:text-primary-foreground flex w-full min-w-0 rounded-md border bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-base transition-[color,box-shadow] outline-none file:inline-flex file:h-7 file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 md:text-sm',
        // 'file:text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground selection:bg-primary selection:text-primary-foreground flex w-full min-w-0 rounded-md border-transparent bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-base transition-[color,box-shadow] outline-none file:inline-flex file:h-7 file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 md:text-sm',
        Glowing(APPS.PORTAL).textareaUIComponent,
        // Default focus rings remain for accessibility in non-themed contexts
        'focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px]',
        'aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 aria-invalid:border-destructive',
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  );
}

export { TextArea };

import * as React from 'react';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

function TextArea({ className, ...props }: React.ComponentProps<'textarea'>) {
  return (
    <textarea
      data-slot="input"
      className={cn(
        'flex w-full min-w-0 px-3 py-1 text-base rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent outline-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground selection:bg-primary selection:text-primary-foreground transition-[color,box-shadow] disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 md:text-sm',
        'focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px]',
        'aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 aria-invalid:border-destructive',
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  );
}

export { TextArea };

<<<<<<< SEARCH
// lib/server/safe-action.ts
import { createSafeActionClient } from 'next-safe-action';
import { z } from 'zod'; // Import Zod
import { loggingMiddleware } from '../..//actions/middleware/logging-middleware';
import { requireCompanyAndPermissions } from '../../actions/middleware/company-and-permissions-middleware'; // Adjust path if needed

// Define the shape of your metadata
const metadataSchema = z.object({
  actionName: z.string().optional(), // Make it optional if not all actions will have it
});

// This function will receive the error object thrown from your server action.
const customServerErrorHandler = (error: Error) => {
  console.error(
    'SERVER ACTION ERROR (CAUGHT BY customServerErrorHandler):',
    error
  );
  // Log the validationErrors if present
  if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'validationErrors' in error) {
    // The 'as any' is to bypass TypeScript's strictness for logging purposes here
    console.error(
      'Zod Validation Errors (from metadata):',
      JSON.stringify((error as any).validationErrors, null, 2)
    );
  }
  return error.message || 'An unexpected error occurred on the server.';
};

// Begin - createSafeActionClient
export const actionClient = createSafeActionClient({
  handleServerError: customServerErrorHandler,
  defineMetadataSchema: () => metadataSchema,
}).use(loggingMiddleware);
// End - createSafeActionClient

// Begin - createActionWithPermissions = Configure your permissioned action client
export function createActionWithPermissions(requiredPermissions?: string[]) {
  const client = createSafeActionClient({
    handleServerError: customServerErrorHandler, // Use the correct property name here as well
    defineMetadataSchema: () => metadataSchema,
  })
    .use(loggingMiddleware)
    .use(requireCompanyAndPermissions(requiredPermissions || []));
  return client;
}
// End - createActionWithPermissions
